member_context: Aetna PPO 2026, deductible $1500, YTD spend $450, in-network
question: Is an MRI of the brain covered?
expected_answer: Yes, MRI is covered. Since you have not met your deductible, you would pay the negotiated rate up to your remaining $1050 deductible.

expected_answer: You would pay the full negotiated rate because you have not met your deductible. Typically $100-150 for a primary care visit.

expected_answer: You are close to your out-of-pocket maximum. You will pay no more than $100 before you hit OOP max, then nothing for the rest of the year.

expected_answer: Yes, your plan requires prior authorization for advanced imaging like MRI. Your provider needs to submit the request before scheduling.

question: Can I use my HSA to pay for my deductible?
expected_answer: Yes, HSA funds can be used to pay your deductible and other qualified medical expenses tax-free.

expected_answer: Your plan covers out-of-network care at 50% after you meet a separate out-of-network deductible. You will pay more than in-network.

member_context: Aetna PPO 2026, preventive care covered 100%

expected_answer: Yes, your annual physical is covered at 100% as preventive care when seen by an in-network provider.
